name: Sprinkler → Start Full Cycle
description: Starts a full cycle of the system. This enables the controller's "auto-advance" feature and disables the queue. The controller will iterate through all enabled valves/zones. They will each run for their configured `run_duration` multiplied by the controller's multiplier value. *Note that if NO valves are enabled when this action is called, the controller will automatically enable all valves.*
